rows.description: Summa totalis omnium Roroplorum et Remanentium S 908 07 1d
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes the first header line and correctly isolates 'in Cista' as a separate line. The numerical value is part of the descriptive text of the header.

Row identified by gemini-flash, correctly separated from the first header and having no associated amounts. Visually confirmed as a distinct header line. gpt-5-mini combined this with the previous header.
Consensus reached. Clearly a header with no associated amounts.
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Civitati Ozon' chosen from gemini-flash after visual verification, as the script clearly shows 'C' and 'z', unlike gpt-5-mini's 'Capitati Oxon'.
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Coll. Edĩs xti – 4 duabus annis' chosen from gemini-flash, as it is a more accurate transcription of the original script than gpt-5-mini's 'Edv. xi p.'.
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Majors capons' chosen from gemini-flash, as the 'j' is clear in the script, rather than gpt-5-mini's 'Mayors'.
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Coll: Edĩs Xti' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row, providing text from the next line instead.
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Collegio Omn. Animarum' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row, providing text from a later line instead.
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Coll: Sti Jo. Bapt' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row, providing text from a later line instead.
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Coll. Balliol' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row, providing text from a later line instead.

Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Curie Hoystings' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row. The pounds amount is clearly '00' upon visual inspection, supporting both models' numerical extraction despite gpt-5-mini's initial uncertainty.
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Procuraçons Coll. Southn. Merton' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description. Visually confirmed amounts as 1 pound, 10 shillings, 0 pence. gpt-5-mini misidentified description and extracted pence as '8' instead of '0'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description. Visually confirmed amounts as 0 pounds, 2 shillings, 0 pence. gpt-5-mini misidentified description and extracted amounts as '2 0 6'.

Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Lotrici Ann 1^ mich 7^' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row. Pence digit '6' is clear upon visual inspection.

Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Jonson' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row. Pence digit '4' is clear upon visual inspection, despite gpt-5-mini noting ink issues.

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts. gpt-5-mini misidentified description and extracted incorrect amounts ('0 0 0'), noting low confidence, which is borne out by visual inspection clearly showing '0 10 0'.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts. gpt-5-mini misidentified description and extracted an incorrect pounds value ('1' instead of '0').
Amounts extracted by consensus. Description 'Bedle of ye beggars' chosen from gemini-flash, as gpt-5-mini misidentified the description for this row.
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts. gpt-5-mini misidentified description and extracted incorrect amounts ('0 15 0').
Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts. gpt-5-mini misidentified description and extracted incorrect amounts ('4 0 0').
Description from gemini-flash. Amounts (4, 0, 0) adopted from gpt-5-mini and confirmed by visual inspection, as gemini-flash incorrectly extracted '0 0 0'.
Description from gemini-flash. Amounts (1, 0, 0) visually confirmed; both extractors had incorrect pounds values (gemini-flash '4', gpt-5-mini '30').

rows.description: Curate of Southn Ann. 1700. 10th Mich. 1700. 10th Ann. 1701 10th
rows.notes: Description adapted from gemini-flash (correctly identifies '1701'). Amounts (30, 0, 0) extracted from gpt-5-mini which correctly identified the large pounds value for this row, confirmed by visual inspection.

Description 'Corne priy' chosen from gemini-flash (more accurate 'y' ending). Amounts (0, 2, 0) confirmed visually and matches gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned the '30' pounds from the previous row to this line.
Description from consensus. Amounts (0, 16, 4) chosen from gpt-5-mini, confirmed by visual inspection. gemini-flash incorrectly extracted amounts for this row ('0 2 0').

Description from gemini-flash (more accurate 'Synodalls'). Amounts (0, 7, 0) chosen from gpt-5-mini, confirmed by visual inspection. gemini-flash incorrectly extracted amounts for this row ('0 16 4').

Selected gemini-flash for accurate description and amounts (0, 7, 0), confirmed by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini misidentified the initial word ('Grines') and incorrectly extracted the amounts ('0 10 0'), seemingly conflating it with the next line.

Amounts extracted by consensus. Description chosen from gemini-flash for slightly better fidelity to original script ('5^s 5^d'). Both extractors correctly noted the difference between the inline textual amount and the ledger column amount, with gpt-5-mini noting the ambiguity of the grouped items, but the ledger amount '00 10 00' is clear for this row.
Description by consensus. Amounts (0, 10, 0) chosen from gemini-flash, confirmed by visual inspection. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted the pounds value ('1').

Row accurately identified and extracted by gemini-flash (description and amounts confirmed visually). gpt-5-mini completely misaligned its rows from this point, incorrectly labeling the description 'Aquad.' and extracting amounts that correspond to a later row.
Consensus reached on description and amounts. Visually confirmed.
Amounts by consensus, visually confirmed. The description field is left blank as the word 'TOTAL' is not explicitly written on the ledger page for this row, aligning with gpt-5-mini's interpretation.
